{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324111217C60BEFB297FE4FAB3AEA"}"},"total":53},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7545529191908328217","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好好好好好好看啊！非常好看，非常爱看，就是太短了[快哭了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756832482,"group_id":"7533448468019285054","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N16K8GmrqY13QCQIq8yVX/c=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ec196f9a3c6541db8f926b7d6b3ef675~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881576&x-signature=9y4ESdid500uvMWzFl7uwLuNRNw%3D","user_id":"997945418717837","user_name":"两年半练习生IKUn"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"997945418717837","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7533448468019285054","book_info":{"abstract":"「恋爱日常」「女追男」「无系统」「高糖」「绝对没有胃疼、恶心、难受的地方」
江白十岁时才知道，他原来转生到了一个小说世界，还是炮灰男配，整天作恶，要么就是舔女主。
之后的八年，江白为了完成任务，给青梅竹马的温软最大的包容和宠溺，这让她以为江白是她最忠诚的狗，根本离不开她
可等炮灰男配的主线结束，系统解绑，江白拿着系统奖励的钱离开，温软才真正看清江白，也才明白，是她温软离不开江白。
她后悔想去找他，可开门的却是别的女人。
……
是你不珍惜，以后他是我的，他由我来疼。
（腹黑妹妹、起初呆傻后期病娇的美少女（38章病娇向为主）、表面成熟背地里疯狂的御姐[17、18章出场]……）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob1770920bbcca0cff8a18a34f6719c5f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"妄寻花","author_id":"","book_id":"7533448468019285054","book_name":"穿书炮灰男配，反派都想独宠我","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7533448557903217214","read_count":"865","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"130640"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"63","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,多女主,腹黑,反派,穿书","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob1770920bbcca0cff8a18a34f6719c5f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779505937&x-signature=385DxBtWjDWuLTBuMMfexgDepQ4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1604923297896132","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"66"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324111217C60BEFB297FE4FAB3AEA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17317,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":771},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7544927799682220862","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"豪刊，目前没有什么大问题。人物塑造不错，主角性格也好。目前有两个问题，一个是林溺原来的样子就很好了，很让人有保护欲，在全是病娇的文里可以算是调味剂正好主角也有点偏袒她可以作为在文中和其他女主斗的倚仗。但是写的记忆觉醒性格变了反而不好。另一个是写的像穷人写的小说，一个大家族的少爷有500万就不自卑？太扯了吧，后面加一两个零算了[思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756695921,"group_id":"7533448468019285054","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我不想上学QAQ","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1M/uzHMSz7OY71/D+M27TcjTi2E0y4rz6VexLXcwaja","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d65772bec6284fe58b370e33bfcb4ba0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881365&x-signature=RfpTLz%2ByO%2FZZBC7eN2ttrPlSA3E%3D","user_id":"3729997004278583","user_name":"富傻白甜双马尾小萝莉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3729997004278583","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7533448468019285054","book_info":{"abstract":"「恋爱日常」「女追男」「无系统」「高糖」「绝对没有胃疼、恶心、难受的地方」
